---
name: bindings.ts rules
description: Rules for the specta-generated Tauri command bindings file
applyTo: "src/bindings.ts"
---

# bindings.ts — see [`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md)

Authoritative rules for the specta-generated `src/bindings.ts` live in the
"`src/bindings.ts` — specta-generated" section of
[`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md). Nearest-AGENTS.md wins per the
[agents.md spec](https://agents.md/).

This file exists so Copilot picks the rules up path-scoped when editing
`src/bindings.ts`. If a rule needs to change, edit `src/AGENTS.md`.
